name: Feature/Improvement Proposal ✨

about: For proposing new features, improvements, or adaptation requirements (please explain the motivation and implementation suggestions)

---

**Target package**

- [ ] @vureact/compiler-core
- [ ] @vureact/runtime-core
- [ ] Other (please specify):

**Feature name**

**Motivation**

- Why is this feature needed? What are the application scenarios?
- Defects or limitations of the current behavior (if any)

**Proposed solution**

- Briefly describe the implementation idea or API design (sample code/interface description is preferred)
- If existing behaviors are affected, please explain compatibility and migration plans

**Optional**

- Related design documents / links
- Reference implementations or libraries
- Priority suggestion: Low / Medium / High

**Acceptance criteria**

- E.g.: Add tests, document examples, performance not lower than X (optional)

---

Thank you for your proposal. We will discuss it in the community and the maintainers will determine the priority and implementation method. If you are willing to contribute to the implementation, please mark it in the Issue and submit a PR (refer to the repository contribution guidelines).
